title: bleba
description: This resource pack changes Inventory GUI on Animated wavy Starfruit
body: # ![bleba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dc7376412ff9cb19bf8221dd85e435eab5e2d5e.png) # # Ằ̸̞͈̯͔͆́̚͟L̴̩̠̱̩̊̈́̌̕E̷̜̞̱͛̌̂͠R̷̝̮̱͒̈̈͑͠T̵͖̻̰̏̾̄̾̓͟͜ .❗️An OptiFine/Animatica is required! **Make sure**, that you're enabled "**Textures Animated**" in Animations (for **OptiFine**) For **Animatica**, you just need **to have** this mod. That's all. # # 🔒 Change - Resourse pack changes default inventory's GUI on funny animated Starlev's avatar flag. # # 🌠 Preview ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G5d2OSpa/images/c5fa6aff404a91bb957af43192e03caa7369a289.gif) # ## ❓ Who is bleba? The bleb or blob (_блёба/блёб_) is unofficial Russian word that means slime (slug) from any game. It sounds more gently and cutely in Russian language. In my case, I've resourse pack, which changes Minecraft Magma Cube's texture (sosamba) to my avatar and it's kinda a symbol in my media. ``` All these resourse packs are made by _dfar_ ``` #
